channel.title: Pi4J Drivers on Pi4J
channel.description: Recent content in Pi4J Drivers on Pi4J

item.title: Drivers Release Notes
item.description:
All releases of the Pi4J Drivers library are listed on github.com/Pi4J/pi4j-drivers/releases.

2026-06-06 - V1.0.0

This is the first release of the Pi4J Drivers library. It brings community-maintained device drivers back to the Pi4J ecosystem as a standalone library, compatible with Pi4J V4+.

The library is the result of years of community work, much of it grown from the pi4j-example-devices repository.

Detailed list of all changes: github.com/Pi4J/pi4j-drivers/releases/tag/1.0.0
